mapper.select: select id, username, password, name, avatar, role, subject from sys_user where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(username, password, name, avatar, role, subject) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{subject})
mapper.update: update sys_user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, name = #{name}, avatar = #{avatar}, role = #{role}, subject = #{subject} where id = #{id}
